title: RAG · multi-hop QA over retrieved passages
blurb: An agent retrieves 10 passages to answer one question. Most are distractors. The extractive selector keeps only the answer-bearing spans.

example.question: Who is older, Annie Morton or Terry Richardson?

units.title: Annie Morton
units.text: Annie Morton (born October 8, 1970) is an American model born in Pennsylvania.

units.title: Annie Morton
units.text: She has appeared on the covers of "British Vogue", "ID", "Marie Claire", and other magazines.

units.title: Annie Morton
units.text: She has been photographed by Helmut Newton; Peter Lindbergh; Annie Leibovitz; Richard Avedon; Juergen Teller; Paul Jasmin, Mary Ellen Mark and Terry Richardson, and modeled for Donna Karan, Givenchy, Guerlain, Chanel, "Harper's Bazaar", "Sports Illustrated" and Victoria's Secret.

units.title: Annie Morton
units.text: A long time vegetarian, an advocate for organic lifestyle choices and natural healthcare.

units.title: Annie Morton
units.text: She co-founded Tsi-La Organics, a "Green Luxury" company that creates and sells vegan, organic perfume and skin care products.

units.title: Madonna (book)
units.text: Madonna is a biography by English author Andrew Morton, chronicling the life of American recording artist Madonna.

units.title: Madonna (book)
units.text: The book was released in November 2001 by St. Martin's Press in the United States and in April 2002 by Michael O'Mara Books in the United Kingdom.

units.title: Madonna (book)
units.text: Morton decided to write a biography on Madonna in 2000.

units.title: Madonna (book)
units.text: The release was announced in April 2001 by St. Martin's Press.

units.title: Madonna (book)
units.text: President and publisher Sally Richardson described the biography to contain details about Madonna's ambitions, her relationships and her lifestyle.

units.title: Terry Richardson
units.text: Terrence "Uncle Terry" Richardson (born August 14, 1965) is an American fashion and portrait photographer who has shot advertising campaigns for Marc Jacobs, Aldo, Supreme, Sisley, Tom Ford, and Yves Saint Laurent among others.

units.title: Terry Richardson
units.text: He has also done work for magazines such as "Rolling Stone", "GQ", "Vogue", "Vanity Fair", "Harper's Bazaar", "i-D", and "Vice".

units.title: Lady Gaga x Terry Richardson
units.text: Lady Gaga x Terry Richardson is a photo-book by American singer Lady Gaga and American photographer Terry Richardson, released on November 22, 2011 by Grand Central Publishing.

units.title: Lady Gaga x Terry Richardson
units.text: The book features more than 350 pictures of Gaga as taken by Richardson during a ten-month period from Gaga's performance at The Monster Ball Tour till the 2011 Grammy Awards.

units.title: Lady Gaga x Terry Richardson
units.text: In addition to photographs, it includes a foreword written by the singer about her relationship with Richardson.

units.title: Lady Gaga x Terry Richardson
units.text: The duo had collaborated on other projects prior to the shooting of the book.

units.title: Gumbo (PJ Morton album)
units.text: Gumbo is the fourth and first self-released studio album by American singer-songwriter PJ Morton.

units.title: Gumbo (PJ Morton album)
units.text: It was released on April 14, 2017, by Morton Records, as the follow-up to his third studio album "New Orleans" (2013).

units.title: Gumbo (PJ Morton album)
units.text: The record incorporates R&B styles with elements of older soul music; its lyrics discuss themes of romance and explores political and personal themes.

units.title: Gumbo (PJ Morton album)
units.text: The album is entirely produced by Morton himself and features guest appearances by Pell, BJ the Chicago Kid and R&B singer Anthony Hamilton's back-up group, The HamilTones.

units.title: Gumbo (PJ Morton album)
units.text: The album features a cover of the Bee Gees' "How Deep Is Your Love".

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: Amanda Lepore (born November 21, 1967) is an American transgender model, celebutante, singer, and performance artist.

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: The former Club Kid has appeared in advertising for numerous companies.

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: Lepore is also noted as a regular subject in photographer David LaChapelle's work, serving as his muse, as well as many other photographers, such as Terry Richardson and .

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: She participated in LaChapelle's "Artists and Prostitutes 1985–2005" exhibit in New York City, where she "lived" in a voyeuristic life-sized set.

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: Lepore has also released several singles, many written by and/or recorded with Cazwell.

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: In 2011, she released her debut studio album, "I..

units.title: Amanda Lepore
units.text: Amanda Lepore", on Peace Bisquit.

units.title: Piano Girl
units.text: Piano Girl (Turkish: "Deli Deli Olma" ) is a 2009 Turkish comedy-drama film, directed by Murat Saraçoğlu, starring Tarık Akan and Şerif Sezer as two elderly people forced to question their histories and reveal their big secrets.

units.title: Piano Girl
units.text: The film, which went on nationwide general release across Turkey on  17, 2009 (2009--) , was the opening film at the Sinema Burada Film Festival in İzmir, Turkey, and has since been screened in competition at a number of other film festivals, including the 46th Antalya Golden Orange Film Festival, where, according to Terry Richardson, writing for Today's Zaman, "the rapt audience gave it a standing ovation."

units.title: Index Magazine
units.text: index Magazine was a prominent New York City based publication with in-depth interviews with prominent figures in art and culture.

units.title: Index Magazine
units.text: It was created by Peter Halley and Bob Nickas in 1996, running until late 2005.

units.title: Index Magazine
units.text: Covering the burgeoning Indie culture of the 1990s, index regularly employed such rising photographers as Juergen Teller, Terry Richardson, Wolfgang Tillmans, and Ryan McGinley, and featured interviews with figures including Björk, Brian Eno, Marc Jacobs, and Scarlett Johansson, mixing new talents and established names in music, film, architecture, fashion, art, and politics.

units.title: Index Magazine
units.text: In addition to famous personalities, the publication also featured a mix of interviews with not so-famous New York personalities such as Queen Itchie or Ducky Doolittle.

units.title: Snoecks
units.text: Snoecks is a Belgian magazine.

units.title: Snoecks
units.text: The huge, 550-plus-page magazine appears once a year in October and focuses on the most interesting new international developments in the arts, photography and literature.

units.title: Snoecks
units.text: In recent editions the book had features on artists such as Anton Corbijn, Larry Sultan, Matthew Barney, Terry Richardson, Ron Mueck, Alberto Garcia-Alix, Peter Lindbergh, Albert Watson, Desiree Dolron, Bettina Rheims, Diana Scheunemann, Timothy Greenfield-Sanders and Andres Serrano.

units.title: Kenton Richardson
units.text: Kenton Terry Richardson (born 26 July 1999) is an English professional footballer who plays as a defender for League Two side Hartlepool United.

title: Conversation memory · compress a long support thread
blurb: A 20-turn support chat. To answer a follow-up, the agent only needs a few turns. The extractive selector keeps the load-bearing turns.

example.question: How many rows are on the orders table being migrated?

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: Hi! Thanks for contacting Acme support. How can I help today?

units.title: user
units.text: user: My deployment keeps failing on the staging environment.

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: Sorry to hear that. Can you share the error you see?

units.title: user
units.text: user: It says 'database migration timeout after 30s'.

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: Got it. Which database version are you on?

units.title: user
units.text: user: We're on Postgres 14.2, upgraded last week from 13.

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: Thanks. Is this on the shared cluster or a dedicated instance?

units.title: user
units.text: user: Dedicated, the db-prod-7 instance in us-east.

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: And how large is the migration — number of rows affected?

units.title: user
units.text: user: It's altering the orders table, about 48 million rows.

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: That's the likely cause. Large ALTERs on 48M rows exceed the 30s statement timeout.

units.title: user
units.text: user: Ah. Can we raise the timeout?

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: Yes — set statement_timeout to 0 for the migration session, or run it as a batched online migration.

units.title: user
units.text: user: Let's do the batched approach. Any tool you recommend?

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: pg-osc or gh-ost-style online schema change works well for tables this size.

units.title: user
units.text: user: Great. Also, will this affect the read replicas?

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: Replicas will lag during the migration but won't drop connections.

units.title: user
units.text: user: Perfect. One more — what was the row count you mentioned again?

units.title: agent
units.text: agent: 48 million rows on the orders table.

units.title: user
units.text: user: Thanks, that's all!

title: Log triage · compress repetitive logs
blurb: A 78-line gateway log, mostly repeated lines. The codec dedups them losslessly so the model can still count and reason over every line at a fraction of the tokens.
question: How many ERROR lines are in this log? Answer with just the number.

title: Agent tool-output · lossless codec
blurb: An MCP tool returns 18 issues with the same repo/user/label objects repeated. The lossless codec factors the repetition into shared definitions — the LLM reads it natively, ZERO information lost.
